blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,678 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
